mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log ( user_id, username, module, action, target, target_id, description, ip_address, user_agent, request_method, request_url, request_params, response_status, execution_time, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{module}, #{action}, #{target}, #{targetId}, #{description}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestParams}, #{responseStatus}, #{executionTime}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT module FROM operation_log WHERE module IS NOT NULL
